texto: You can't come in."Luna Morgan met her daughter's plaintive gaze with a blank one of her own. "What do you mean we can't come in?""I have a guest," Ivy said."Is he naked?" Max asked, wrinkling his nose."Who?""Your guest," Max said."It's not a man," Ivy said, rolling her eyes. "Get your mind out of the gutter.
explicacao: Pergunta retórica de Lily Harper Hart que provoca temas ligados a reflexao. Ao questionar “You can't come in."Luna Morgan met her daughter's plaintive gaze with a blank one of her own. "Wh…”, o texto convida o leitor a revisar crenças sobre reflexao, ivy, max, com foco em max e mystery.
